intro: Heleniastrum hoopesii, also known as Indian Gentian, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antidiarrheal, and antiseptic properties, making it a popular remedy for digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Indian Gentian include iridoids, such as gentiopicroside, and flavonoids, like gentisin, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Herbal preparations made from Indian Gentian include teas, tinctures, and capsules, often used to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and promote overall well-being.
